info.title: MCP.Evals
info.description: A comprehensive evaluation framework for testing Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers with language models. Provides automated testing capabilities, multi-LLM support, and built-in metrics collection.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: MCP Evals - Evaluation framework for MCP servers

commands.name: evaluate
commands.description: Run MCP evaluations from a configuration file

arguments.name: config-path
arguments.description: Path to the evaluation configuration file (.yaml, .yml, or .json)

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Validate an MCP evaluation configuration file

arguments.name: config-path
arguments.description: Path to the evaluation configuration file to validate
